purpose: Primary-source retrieval for STHO critical blockers; correct cash/debt NAV error; split Magnolia/Asbury residual.
resolved_facts: Margin Loan $92.8M SOFR+3.50% pledged by Safe Shares; Safe Credit $115M @ 8%; debt net $207.0M.
MD&A monetizing portfolio $71.4M; residual Magnolia/Asbury carrying $153.6M.
Management fee schedule $25/$15/$10/$7.5M then 2% GBV ex-SAFE; termination overhang ~$5M before 2027-03-31.
DTA valuation allowance to zero; 2025 cash taxes $0.2M.

gap_assessments.reconciliation: Gross mark and debt stack reproduced from Note 7/9 plus current SAFE price. Exact share count and numeric LTV triggers still open.
gap_assessments.remaining_uncertainty: Integer share count; LTV trigger percentages; make-whole.
gap_assessments.valuation_consequence: SAFE base marked near current market; senior debt corrected from -1.19 to about -17.1.
gap_assessments.falsifier: Collateral/forced-sale path nets below low SAFE component.

gap_assessments.reconciliation: MD&A monetizing schedule and Magnolia/Asbury residual carrying rebuilt from 10-Q/10-K/8-K. No primary bid sheet.
gap_assessments.remaining_uncertainty: Asset-level sale prices and timing for Magnolia lots and Asbury residual ops/sites.
gap_assessments.valuation_consequence: Split monetizing vs Magnolia/Asbury residual so ~$12.7/sh carrying is no longer hidden.
gap_assessments.falsifier: Sales clear below low-case recovery after costs.
gap_assessments.monitoring_source: 8-K asset sales; 10-Q Notes 4–6; Magnolia lot closings.

gap_assessments.reconciliation: Contractual fee schedule, termination formula, and DTA/cash-tax facts retrieved. Multi-year 2% GBV path and sale-tax friction remain estimates.
gap_assessments.remaining_uncertainty: GBV fee base after year four; gain tax on sales; whether termination path is used.
gap_assessments.valuation_consequence: Fee reserve anchored to $7.5M then 2% GBV path (~$1–2.5/sh).
gap_assessments.monitoring_source: Note 1 Management Agreement; tax note; fee line in 10-Q.

committee_conclusion: Human thesis points evaluated: $25 SAFE deal mark is a real spin-day cross-check; duration/rate sensitivity supports high case only; land sales above COS support milder RE haircuts; manager contestability is a 2027-03-31 cliff (RFP prep in H2 2026). Still evidence-blocked.

safe_deal_mark.note: High SAFE component uses ~$25 path; not a put. Rate-driven.

ground_lease_duration.evidence: SAFE IR: ~99-year typical leases; ~91–92 year W.A. extended term. Long-duration equity mark.
